items.title: AWS Lambda expands response streaming support to all commercial AWS Regions
items.snippet: AWS Lambda response streaming is now available in all commercial AWS Regions, bringing full regional parity for this capability. Customers in newly supported Regions can use the InvokeWithResponseStream API to progressively stream response payloads back to…

items.title: Launching S3 Files, making S3 buckets accessible as file systems
items.snippet: Amazon S3 Files makes S3 buckets accessible as high-performance file systems on AWS compute resources, eliminating the tradeoff between object storage benefits and interactive file capabilities while enabling seamless data sharing with ~1ms latencies.

items.title: AWS Cost Explorer launches Natural Language Query capabilities powered by Amazon Q
items.snippet: AWS Cost Explorer now brings Amazon Q Developer's generative AI capabilities directly into your cost analysis workflows. You can now use natural language queries to ask Amazon Q questions about your AWS cost and usage data. In addition to providing answers to…

items.title: Amazon Lightsail is now available in the Asia Pacific (Malaysia) Region

items.snippet: Amazon Bedrock, the platform for building generative AI applications and agents at production scale, now offers Claude Mythos Preview in gated research preview as part of Project Glasswing. Claude Mythos Preview is Anthropic's most advanced AI model to date,…

items.snippet: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio now supports Serverless Workflows in Identity Center domains. With this launch, customers using Identity Center domains can orchestrate data processing tasks with Apache Airflow (powered by Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow)…

items.title: Announcing Amazon S3 Files, making S3 buckets accessible as file systems
items.snippet: S3 Files delivers a shared file system that connects any AWS compute resource directly with your data in Amazon S3. With S3 Files, Amazon S3 is the first and only cloud object store that provides fully-featured, high-performance file system access to your…

items.title: Amazon RDS for Oracle now supports M8i and R8i instances

items.title: Amazon Braket adds support for Rigetti's 108-qubit Cepheus QPU
items.snippet: Amazon Braket, the quantum computing service from AWS, now offers access to Rigetti's Cepheus-1-108Q device, the first 100+ qubit superconducting quantum processing unit (QPU) available on Amazon Braket. Cepheus-1-108Q uses Rigetti's modular multi-chip…

items.title: AWS Transfer Family now supports IPv6 for connectors and web apps

items.snippet: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio notebooks now support import/export capabilities, enabling migration from JupyterLab and other notebook platforms. This release also introduces developer acceleration features including cell reordering, keyboard shortcuts, cell…

items.snippet: Customers can now create Amazon FSx for OpenZFS file systems in the AWS Asia Pacific (Melbourne) Region, providing fully managed shared file storage built on the OpenZFS file system. Amazon FSx makes it easier and more cost effective to launch, run, and scale…

items.snippet: AWS today announced the general availability of Smithy-Java, an open-source Java framework for generating type-safe clients and standalone classes from Smithy models. Smithy-Java addresses one of the most consistently requested capabilities from enterprise…

items.title: Amazon Bedrock Guardrails supports cross-account safeguards with centralized control and management
items.snippet: Organizational safeguards are now generally available in Amazon Bedrock Guardrails, enabling centralized enforcement and management of safety controls across multiple AWS accounts within an AWS Organization.
